name: How Might We (HMW)
what_it_is: A reframing technique converting problem statements into open opportunity questions - replacing "the problem is X" with "how might we achieve Y?"
core_mechanic: Take the challenge. Rewrite as "How Might We...?" Wide enough to allow creative solutions, narrow enough to provide direction. Too wide = useless. Too narrow = already a solution. Find the right abstraction level.
when_to_use: Problem statements framed as solutions in disguise / Design challenges where you want solution diversity / When the Skeptic identified the problem framing itself is wrong
when_not_to_use: Problem is well-defined and solutions are needed - HMW reframes problems, doesn't generate solutions / Execution mode
ideaos_application: Agent 3 generates 3 HMW questions at different abstraction levels (narrow, medium, wide) and recommends which level to work from based on the Router's mode tag.
